       kh.khly,
       kh.khlx,
       kh.syms,
       kh.country
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.company_name=[客户来访.公司名称]) LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cp.sid,
       cp.cpbh,
       cp.cpgg,
       cp.zyhh,
       cp.yse,
       cp.zwpm,
       cp.ywpm,
       cp.jldw,
       cp.cgdj,
       cp.hhcb,
       cp.mjfob,
       cp.tsl,
       cp.bzdw,
       cp.nhrl,
       cp.bzrl,
       cp.bzcd,
       cp.bzkd,
       cp.bzgd,
       cp.bztj,
       cp.zhwbzh,
       cp.bzhfsh,
       cp.mxmz,
       cp.mxjz,
       cp.chpkzh,
       cp.caizi,
       cp.cszl,
       cp.cpsm,
       cp.ywsm,
       cp.sccj,
       cp.chpchc,
       cp.ywtp,
       cp.cpfl,
       cp.yjfl,
       cp.ejfl,
       cp.sjfl,
       cp.flmc,
       cp.zzsl,
       cp.tsl,
       cp.ljrk
FROM cp 
WHERE (cp.cpbh=[客户来访.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  OR (cp.ypjbh=:ypjbh) LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cjcp.sid,
       cjcp.krhh,
       cjcp.ljrk,
       cjcp.cpbh,
       cjcp.cpgg,
       cjcp.yse,
       cjcp.zwpm,
       cjcp.ywpm,
       cjcp.jldw,
       cjcp.cgdj,
       cjcp.mjfob,
       cjcp.hhcb,
       cjcp.tsl,
       cjcp.bzdw,
       cjcp.nhrl,
       cjcp.bzrl,
       cjcp.bzcd,
       cjcp.bzkd,
       cjcp.bzgd,
       cjcp.bztj,
       cjcp.zhwbzh,
       cjcp.bzhfsh,
       cjcp.mxmz,
       cjcp.mxjz,
       cjcp.chpkzh,
       cjcp.caizi,
       cjcp.cszl,
       cjcp.cpsm,
       cjcp.ywsm,
       cjcp.chpchc,
       cjcp.topcz,
       cjcp.bottomcz,
       cjcp.Coating,
       cjcp.sccj,
       cjcp.wbcz,
       cjcp.qtcz,
       cjcp.houd,
       cjcp.zxcgl,
       cjcp.bh123,
       cjcp.dh123,
       cjcp.zwcc,
       cjcp.ywcc,
       cjcp.chpkzh,
       cjcp.nhwx,
       cjcp.wypp,
       cjcp.ggwy,
       cjcp.czwy,
       cjcp.yswy,
       cjcp.wysm,
       cjcp.cpfl,
       cjcp.yjfl,
       cjcp.ejfl,
       cjcp.sjfl,
       cjcp.djpm,
       cjcp.djpmy,
       cjcp.djpmw,
       cjcp.krCODE,
       cjcp.flmc,
       cjcp.zwdw,
       cjcp.caiziz,
       cjcp.ksy,
       cjcp.ksw,
       cjcp.cpggz,
       cjcp.zzsl,
       cjcp.tsl,
       cjcp.zhwbzh,
       cjcp.bzhfsh,
       cjcp.krsl,
       cjcp.bzdw,
       cjcp.cplb,
       cjcp.yjlb,
       cjcp.ejlb,
       cjcp.sjlb,
       cjcp.krtm,
       cjcp.bgpm,
       cjcp.hgbm,
       cjcp.bgjldw,
       cjcp.bz3,
       cjcp.sfhs,
       cjcp.ysez,
       cjcp.bz3,
       cjcp.ks,
       cjcp.bzyq,
       cjcp.rkdd,
       cjcp.zyhh
FROM cjcp 
WHERE (cjcp.cpbh=[客户来访.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  AND permission('') LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT cscpsheet.sid,
       cs.company_name,
       cs.phone,
       cs.fax,
       cs.address,
       cs.email,
       cscpsheet.lshh,
       cscpsheet.cpgg,
       cscpsheet.yse,
       cscpsheet.zwpm,
       cscpsheet.ywpm,
       cscpsheet.jldw,
       cscpsheet.cgdj,
       cscpsheet.hgbm,
       cscpsheet.zzsl,
       cscpsheet.tsl,
       cscpsheet.zhwbzh,
       cscpsheet.bzhfsh,
       cscpsheet.mxmz,
       cscpsheet.mxjz,
       cscpsheet.chpchc,
       cscpsheet.caizi,
       cscpsheet.houd,
       cscpsheet.zxcgl,
       cscpsheet.tempSerialID,
       cscpsheet.cpbh
FROM cs,cscpsheet 
WHERE (cs.sid=cscpsheet.pid) 
  AND (cs.cs_id=:cs_id) 
ORDER BY cscpsheet.sid ASC

actions.expression:
SELECT cpsheet.sid,
       cpsheet.cs_id,
       cpsheet.sccj,
       cpsheet.gcpf,
       cpsheet.gchh,
       cpsheet.jg,
       cpsheet.sl,
       cpsheet.jldw,
       cpsheet.bgpm,
       cpsheet.bjrq,
       cpsheet.chrq,
       cpsheet.bz,
       cpsheet.bgpm,
       cpsheet.bzrl,
       cpsheet.zzsl,
       cpsheet.kfkp,
       cpsheet.ljrk
FROM cp,cpsheet 
WHERE (cp.sid=cpsheet.pid) 
  AND ((cp.cpbh=[客户来访.产品资料.产品编号]) 
  OR (cp.ypjbh=:ypjbh)) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY cpsheet.sid ASC

fields.caption: 中文品名
fields.output: 客户来访.来访选样.中文品名

fields.caption: 唯一字段
fields.output: 客户来访.来访选样.唯一字段

fields.caption: 样品number
fields.output: 客户来访.来访选样.样品number

fields.caption: 是否核销
fields.output: 客户来访.来访选样.是否核销

actions.expression:
SELECT ypxjglsheet.sid,
       ypxjglsheet.riqi,
       ypxjglsheet.ypxzh,
       ypxjglsheet.shl,
       ypxjglsheet.jldw,
       ypxjglsheet.laiy,
       ypxjglsheet.ypqx,
       ypxjglsheet.czry,
       ypxjglsheet.bzh,
       ypxjglsheet.cpzt,
       ypxjglsheet.ljck,
       ypxjglsheet.czr,
       ypxjglsheet.cpbh,
       ypxjglsheet.lxm,
       ypxjglsheet.zwpm,
       ypxjglsheet.wyzd,
       ypxjglsheet.rid,
       ypxjglsheet.sfhx
FROM ypckgl,ypxjglsheet 
WHERE (ypckgl.rid=ypxjglsheet.pid) 
  AND (ypckgl.lfrq=[客户来访.来访日期]) 
  AND (ypckgl.company_name=[客户来访.公司名称]) 
  AND (ifnull(ypckgl.lfrq,"")<>"") 
  AND (ifnull(ypckgl.company_name,"")<>"") 
ORDER BY ypxjglsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 客户来访.费用合计
actions.caption: 客户来访.费用合计
actions.expression: [客户来访.来访费用.费用金额]

actions.name: 计算-内盒装箱量
actions.caption: 计算-内盒装箱量
actions.expression: [客户来访.产品资料.外箱装箱量]/[客户来访.产品资料.内盒/外箱]
actions.output: 客户来访.产品资料.内盒装箱量

actions.name: 计算-总 体 积
actions.caption: 计算-总 体 积
actions.expression: [客户来访.产品资料.外箱体积m3]*[客户来访.产品资料.箱    数]
actions.output: 客户来访.产品资料.总 体 积

actions.name: 计算-总 毛 重
actions.caption: 计算-总 毛 重
actions.expression: [客户来访.产品资料.毛    重]*[客户来访.产品资料.箱    数]
actions.output: 客户来访.产品资料.总 毛 重

actions.name: 计算-总 净 重
actions.caption: 计算-总 净 重
actions.expression: [客户来访.产品资料.净    重]*[客户来访.产品资料.箱    数]
actions.output: 客户来访.产品资料.总 净 重

actions.name: 计算-T外销单价
actions.caption: 计算-T外销单价
actions.expression: [客户来访.产品资料.外销单价]+[客户来访.产品资料.纸卡费用]+[客户来访.产品资料.验 货 费]+[客户来访.产品资料.包装费用]
actions.output: 客户来访.产品资料.T外销单价

SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_)
 or  (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_)
   or  (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) and (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

FROM cyzglsheet
WHERE  (cyzglsheet.zm="样品间区域标志")
ORDER BY cyzglsheet.xm ASC

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[客户来访.产品资料.产品大类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[客户来访.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[客户来访.产品资料.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[客户来访.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[客户来访.产品资料.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[客户来访.产品资料.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl
